title: Elaphoglossum gracile
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum gracile is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which includes ferns commonly known as wood ferns or shield ferns. The genus Elaphoglossum itself belongs to the order Polypodiales, a group of ferns characterized by their simple or forked leaves. The family Dryopteridaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Elaphoglossum being part of the subfamily Elaphoglossoideae. This fern's classification is crucial for understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species. Elaphoglossum gracile's placement within the plant kingdom is essential for botanists studying its characteristics and behavior.
